name: Casserole BBQ Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat dry.
2. In a bowl, mix the flour and 2 teaspoons of salt. Coat the pieces with the flour mixture.
3. In a skillet, heat the oil. Brown the chicken on all sides. Remove the browned chicken and place it in a 3-quart casserole. Discard the drippings.
4. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients, mixing well. Spoon sauce over the chicken, ensuring that all pieces are covered.
5. Cover the casserole.
6. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees F for about 1-1/4 hours, or until the chicken is fork-tender. If desired, serve the chicken with the sauce over hot rice. Makes 4 to 6 servings with about 3 cups of sauce.
